name: The Rough Rider
description: The Rough Rider is a rare Jakobs shield that provides no shield capacity and never recharges. In exchange, it boosts maximum health and grants a fixed damage reduction. As your shield is always empty, shield-depleted bonuses remain active permanently, while effects that need a full shield will never trigger. It pairs well with tanky, self-heal focused playstyles and constant health sustain.
notes:
Jakobs only shield.

Uses a Turtle-style shield body. Although shown as 0 capacity, some UI situations treat it as having 100 maximum shield for display checks, but it still cannot recharge.

Flat shield-capacity increases can cause it to function like a normal shield. Fixed capacity reductions can also interfere with the always-depleted behaviour.

special.description:
A permanently empty shield that increases maximum health and reduces incoming damage by 20%. Keeps shield-depleted skills active at all times.

Strong with Axton (Crisis Management), Maya (Fleet), Salvador (Out of Bubblegum, Inconceivable), Zer0 (Fearless), and Krieg (Empty the Rage, Embrace the Pain).

"It takes more than that to kill a Bull Moose."
special.title: It takes more than that to kill a Bull Moose.

abilities: Increases resistance to all damage types.
